signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Below 2.3-2.4% Consensus)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

South Korea's annual consumer price inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but tempered by government fuel caps and food vouchers, missing market forecasts of 2.3-2.4% and monthly expectations of 0.6% (actual 0.3%)[1][2][3]. Core
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
